narrative:
Monroe Twp/Continental (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,315 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
